title: stevia cathartica
intro: Stevia cathartica, also known as Stevia rebaudiana's lesser-known relative, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant is rich in steviol glycosides, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues due to its medicinal properties as a bitter agent and laxative. The health benefits of Stevia cathartica include its ability to regulate blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Stevia cathartica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential and efficacy.
